/usr/bin/cc -fPIC --coverage -g -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=leak -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -fsanitize=undefined -fno-sanitize-recover=undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g -shared  -o ../../lib/python/nimcp.so CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/__/bindings/python/nimcp_python.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin: /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so ../middleware/libnimcp_middleware.a -lm -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
